mapper.sql: select maker_mat_no, cust_mat_no, cust_color_code, order_no, part_name, back_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from mo_material_bom
mapper.select: where maker_mat_no = #{makerMatNo} and cust_mat_no = #{custMatNo} and cust_color_code = #{custColorCode} and order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: insert into mo_material_bom(maker_mat_no, cust_mat_no, cust_color_code, order_no, part_name, back_no, create_by, create_time) values(#{makerMatNo},#{custMatNo},#{custColorCode},#{orderNo},#{partName},#{backNo},#{createBy},NOW())

insert into mo_material_bom(maker_mat_no, cust_mat_no, cust_color_code, order_no, part_name, back_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{t.makerMatNo}, #{t.custMatNo},#{t.custColorCode},#{t.orderNo},#{t.partName},#{t.backNo},#{t.createBy},#{t.createTime}, #{t.updateBy}, #{t.updateTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE part_name = VALUES(part_name), back_no = VALUES(back_no), create_by = VALUES(create_by), create_time = VALUES(create_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
